_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Skill in data pre-processing (e.g., imputation, dimensionality reduction, normalization, transformation, extraction, filtering, smoothing).
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of data literacy concepts, including reading and interpreting charts, understanding data sources, recognizing misleading visualizations, and applying basic statistical reasoning.
comments: DCWF ksa intersects with WIDAI OP domain. OP-K-005 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: AI-S-002 (AI, cosine: 0.503), DQ-S-003 (DQ, cosine: 0.497).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 4.9/10 (raw 0.486). Shared vocabulary: [data]. DCWF-only terms [dimensionality, extraction, filtering, imputation, normalization, pre] vs WIDAI-only terms [applying, basic, charts, concepts, interpreting, knowledge] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.865 (P=0.863, R=0.866). Balanced P/R — the 13-word DCWF element and 21-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.3%). "Skill in data pre-processing (e.g., imputation, dimensionality reduction, normal" and "Knowledge of data literacy concepts, including reading and interpreting charts," are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.527 ≈ STS 0.486 (gap 0.042). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [data] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 3.0%. Shared tokens: [data]. DCWF-only: [dimensionality, extraction, filtering, imputation, normalization, pre]. WIDAI-only: [applying, basic, charts, concepts, interpreting, knowledge].
